meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Scale Your Freelance Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Master Claude Code and Antigravity with this expert beginner checklist designed to streamline your freelance development workflow.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance projects, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and architectural scaffolding. By treating your codebase as a modular interface, you reduce manual coding time by 70%. This setup transforms your workflow from a manual grind into a high-velocity, automated production engine for client delivery.
content.intro:
You’re staring at the clock, the deadline is a looming shadow, and your project is stuck in the 'manual labor' phase. You’re not just building features; you’re fighting your own architecture, manually linking dependencies, and losing hours to repetitive boilerplate. The dream of a scalable freelance business is dying under the weight of slow, manual production.

But the tide is turning. By mastering the synergy between Antigravity and Claude Code, you shift from a solo coder to an AI-augmented architect. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about building a repeatable, high-leverage system that lets you ship complex SaaS projects with the efficiency of a full-scale engineering team.

steps.title: Initialize the Workspace Environment
steps.description: Establish a clean base to ensure Claude Code has full context of your project structure without noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a project scaffold with strict TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and a modular folder structure optimized for rapid feature iteration.

steps.title: Configure System Contextual Rules
steps.description: Define the 'rules of the road' so Claude maintains your specific architectural patterns across every file.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .clauderules file that enforces clean architecture, dependency injection, and unit testing requirements for all generated components.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define the schema, then have Claude Code implement the functional logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CRUD interface for a User profile entity, including Zod validation and React hooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement the schema generated in the previous step with full type safety."

steps.title: Refactor for Modular Scale
steps.description: Ensure your code isn't just fast, but maintainable for future client handovers or updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for tight coupling and suggest a refactor into decoupled feature modules.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Run final automated tests to ensure your automated workflow meets production standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite covering critical paths in the authentication and payment flows.

pro_tips: Always maintain a .clauderules file to prevent the AI from defaulting to deprecated libraries.
Use Antigravity to define your business logic in plain English before letting Claude write the implementation code.
Run 'claude review' every 30 minutes to catch architectural drift before it propagates through your files.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' CLI to batch-edit multiple files simultaneously using regex-based instructions.
Create a library of 'Golden Prompts' in your Antigravity dashboard to standardize your specific coding style across different freelance clients.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, start by migrating one small, repetitive module from an existing project to test the efficiency gains. Document the time saved and use that data to justify higher rates for your future clients.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to outpace your competition and turn your freelance side-hustle into a scalable agency. Don't let another project stall in the manual coding trap. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
